message:
fix(sync): enforce FIFO fairness in semaphore acquire

Fixes queue jumping bug where new arrivals could grab permits before
earlier-waiting tasks. The semaphore now checks if the waiter is at
the front of the queue before allowing acquisition.

- Added is_next_in_line check using is_none_or() before permit acquire
- Applied fix to both AcquireFuture and OwnedAcquireFuture
- Added 3 unit tests for FIFO invariants:
  - test_semaphore_fifo_basic: first waiter acquires before second
  - test_semaphore_no_queue_jump: new arrival can't bypass queue
  - test_semaphore_cancel_preserves_order: cancel doesn't affect ordering

Closes bd-3ses

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
